titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the William Ballard Hoyt papers, 1878-1881.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by M.E. Warren

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

profiledesc.creation: Finding aid encoded by Martin HeggestadApril 2003

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the William Ballard Hoyt Papers,1878-1881
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2002 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Notebooks kept and letters written by Hoyt concerning class work and athletics.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Notebooks kept and letters written by Hoyt concerning class work and athletics.

did.unittitle: Student notebook kept by William B. Hoyt: notes on psychology course and also on "Warfare between Ecclesiasticism and the Political, Mental and Moral Sciences" by Andrew D. White
Small notebook containing few notes on crew and rowing and other miscellaneous entries
Small notebook containing miscellaneous entries such as small accounts, what appear to be lecture notes, etc.
Letter, dated Apr. 14, from William Channing Russell to George Burr about his leaving Cornell [removed to Burr Papers, May 1990 per EE]
Letter, dated September, to Dr. F. L. O. Roehrig (written in Latin) [removed to separate collection, per EE]
Letter, dated February 1, from William B. Hoyt to his brother Albert H. Hoyt; also postcard Oct. 12 (?)
Letter, dated Feb. 15, from William B. Hoyt to his parents
Letter, dated June 2, from Hoyt to his mother
Letter, dated Nov. 24, commencing "Dear Mother" but letter is either unfinished or not signed
Printed circular letter, dated January 31, from New York Association of Cornell University

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: William Ballard Hoyt papers, #37-5-563. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
